label: Pulse Morph Run
description: A one-button flier where rhythm-shaped gates mutate in real time and precise passes rewrite the next obstacle.

label: Neon Route Weave
description: A neon rhythm-flap arcade run with glowing route threads, impact flashes, polished HUD, and cinematic feedback that supports beat-linked gate weaving.

label: Neon Route Echo
description: A neon arcade flyer polished with trails, impact flashes, animated HUD panels, and cinematic feedback that reinforces route-writing, echo assists, and rhythm phase play.
